subtasks.description: Count the distinct number of users per publisher in Q3 2024.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.sql: SELECT cf.publisher, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id) as distinct_user_count FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.event_date >= '2024-07-01' AND cf.event_date < '2024-10-01' GROUP BY cf.publisher ORDER BY cf.publisher
